meta.title: Courier CS Ground-Truth Answer Key
meta.purpose: The known truth the build scores agents against. Per reason: the correct gate outcome and the checklist a good response must contain. Response quality = share of required elements present.

outcomes.resolve: The agent (bot or human) can settle it with information or an approved self-serve action.
outcomes.escalate: Must be routed to a human specialist or back-office team (claims, disputes, conduct, finance).
outcomes.decline: Out of scope or non-business; politely refuse and redirect, never resolve or escalate.

reasons.escalate_if: no scan movement for more than 3 days
good_response_must_include: acknowledge the concern
give the latest scan: status, location, time
explain the likely cause (in transit / hub backlog)
set the next-update or ETA expectation
if stale beyond threshold, open an investigation with a reference number
reasons.bad_response_example: It shows in transit, please keep waiting.

reasons.reason: Tracking says delivered but not received
good_response_must_include: apologize for the situation
confirm the delivery record: time, location, proof of delivery
open a proof-of-delivery investigation with a reference number
advise checking household / neighbour / guardhouse
set a callback SLA (for example 24 to 48 hours)
reasons.bad_response_example: Our system shows it was delivered, please check around your house.

good_response_must_include: give the estimated delivery date or window
state the current status
flag any known delay
offer delivery notifications
reasons.bad_response_example: Soon.

reasons.reason: Stuck at sorting hub / customs / in transit too long
reasons.escalate_if: dwell time exceeds the normal range for that stage
good_response_must_include: explain the current stage (sorting / customs clearance) and typical dwell time
give an updated ETA
if abnormally long, raise to operations with a reference
reassure the parcel is not lost
reasons.bad_response_example: It is at the hub, nothing we can do.

reasons.reason: Out for delivery but nothing arrived
reasons.escalate_if: a failed attempt was logged or no delivery by end of day
good_response_must_include: confirm the out-for-delivery status
set the same-day expectation
if a failed attempt was logged, explain redelivery and offer to reschedule
if no attempt by end of day, raise to the delivery hub
reasons.bad_response_example: It is out for delivery, just wait.

good_response_must_include: confirm the missed attempt
offer the next redelivery date or self-collect
confirm the address and contact number
give a confirmation reference
reasons.bad_response_example: You missed it, it will be returned.

reasons.reason: Marked 'recipient unavailable' but customer was home
good_response_must_include: apologize for the false attempt
log the dispute
arrange a priority re-attempt
route feedback to the delivery hub / rider
give a reference and a callback
reasons.bad_response_example: The rider says no one was home, please wait for the next attempt.

reasons.reason: Change delivery address or reschedule date
reasons.escalate_if: change requested after out-for-delivery / past cutoff
good_response_must_include: confirm what change is allowed at this stage
make the change or state the cutoff
confirm the new details with a reference
if too late, offer alternatives (self-collect, redelivery)
reasons.bad_response_example: Address cannot be changed.

good_response_must_include: confirm eligibility for self-collection
give the branch / hub address and opening hours
state what to bring (ID, tracking number)
hold the parcel and confirm
reasons.bad_response_example: You can come and collect.

reasons.category: C. Damaged, lost, wrong or missing items
good_response_must_include: apologize with empathy
explain the claim steps and required evidence (photos, packaging, value)
open a claim with a reference number
set a resolution timeline
advise the customer to retain the packaging
reasons.bad_response_example: Sorry about that, nothing we can do once delivered.

reasons.category: C. Damaged, lost, wrong or missing items
good_response_must_include: apologize
confirm the last known status
open a loss investigation and claim with a reference
explain the compensation policy and coverage limits
state who files (sender vs receiver) and the timeline
reasons.bad_response_example: It is lost, please contact the seller.

reasons.category: C. Damaged, lost, wrong or missing items
good_response_must_include: apologize
arrange pickup of the wrong parcel
open an investigation to locate the correct parcel
give a reference and timeline
reasons.bad_response_example: Please return it to the nearest branch yourself.

reasons.category: C. Damaged, lost, wrong or missing items
good_response_must_include: apologize
gather details (what is missing, packaging condition, weight)
open an investigation
note it may involve the seller's packing
give a reference and timeline
reasons.bad_response_example: We only deliver sealed parcels, talk to the seller.

reasons.reason: Special delivery instruction (leave at guardhouse / neighbour / door)
good_response_must_include: confirm the instruction can be added (or the policy limit)
attach the note to the shipment
advise on liability if left unattended
confirm
reasons.bad_response_example: We cannot follow special instructions.

good_response_must_include: apologize sincerely
capture details (rider, time, what happened)
log a formal conduct complaint
route to the hub / operations
give a reference and assure follow-up
reasons.bad_response_example: Noted, we will tell them.

reasons.reason: Parcel left unattended / thrown / not handed over properly
good_response_must_include: apologize
capture details of the mishandling
check for damage and open a claim if needed
log a handling complaint to the hub
give a reference and follow-up
reasons.bad_response_example: It was delivered, that is what matters.

reasons.reason: Wrong COD amount / already paid but still showing owing
good_response_must_include: apologize
verify the COD record and payment proof
raise to the finance / COD team
give a reference and resolution timeline
reassure there will be no double charge
reasons.bad_response_example: Please just pay the amount shown.

reasons.escalate_if: the fee appears to be an error or is formally disputed
good_response_must_include: explain the specific fee and how it is calculated (zone, weight or volumetric)
show the breakdown
if it looks like an error, raise it for review
offer the dispute path
reasons.bad_response_example: That is the standard charge.

reasons.reason: Schedule a pickup / rider did not show
good_response_must_include: confirm the pickup details
reschedule with a new window and a reference
apologize for the no-show
if repeated, escalate to the pickup hub
reasons.bad_response_example: Please wait for the next pickup round.

good_response_must_include: explain the return-to-sender / reship options and any fee
confirm the chosen action
give a reference and timeline
reasons.bad_response_example: Rejected parcels are returned automatically.

out_of_scope.category: Out of scope (not one of the 20)
good_response_must_include: politely decline
state it is outside customer-service scope
redirect to what can be helped with
out_of_scope.bad_response_example: Answers an off-topic or internal-data question it should refuse.
